subparts.text: What is Big Data? Explain the key characteristics of Big Data . 1
What is Hadoop Streaming, and how does it work? 1
Explain different types of Hadoop I/O compression techniques and their advantages. 2
Discuss Hadoop Archives and how it optimizes storage in HDFS. 2
Explain the architecture and components of Apache Hadoop with a diagram. 1
Explain the Hadoop ecosystem and its major components in detail. 1
What was the main challenge that led to the development of Hadoop? How does Hadoop analyze large datasets efficiently? 1
Describe serialization in Hadoop and explain how Avro is used for efficient data storage. 2
What are the main components of HDFS, and what are their roles? Explain any two commands from the HDFS command-line interface. 2
Explain the role of Flume and Sqoop in data ingestion. Compare their functionalities and describe their data flow processes. 2
